channel.title: Data Centers on Datadripco
channel.description: Recent content in Data Centers on Datadripco

item.title: AI's Ethical Quagmire: Ghost Authors, Battlefield Bots, and Empty Pledges
item.description: Ever wonder how AI is bringing back dead authors to critique your emails while quietly powering battlefield simulations, all under the guise of vague tech pledges? Let's unpack the real ethical messes and what we can do about them.
